title: Approaching Discount
description: Approaching discount object. Contains the details of an approaching promotion

class.description: Type of approaching promotions. Order or Shipping

threshold.description: Threshold amount to be within promotions purchase condition. i.e. Purchase condition $50, upsell at $40, threshold = $10.

total.description: Total merchandise amount in the cart matching the promotions conditions (could be entire cart, items in a specific category, etc.)
